s: In 2017, Victor Arano suited up for PHI as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 1.690, WHIP 0.940, SO 13, WAR 0.300.
In 2018, Victor Arano suited up for PHI as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 2.730, WHIP 1.200, SO 60, WAR 0.800.
In 2019, Victor Arano suited up for PHI as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 3.860, WHIP 0.860, SO 7, WAR 0.000.
Changed teams after the previous season (PHI -> WSN).
In 2022, Victor Arano suited up for WSN as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 4.500, WHIP 1.400, SO 44, WAR 0.300. Notable context: Joined WSN.
